Notes: First cool front of the season. Mackerel running well off the key.
Quick solo morning before lunch service. Two slot reds on the grill that night.
Long offshore run with Petros. Two gag released under slot. Good day on the reefs.
Calm pre-Christmas trip. Freezer stocked for the holidays. Released one short sheepshead.
Gout flare started Jan 10. No trip. Right big toe.
Good morning. Short trip, shoulder sore. Kept all four.
Petros fishing day. Pompano was excellent. Released undersized sheepshead.
Long run to Middle Grounds. Two gag released (under slot). Red grouper went in the freezer.
Great morning on the water. One slot snook kept. Released large female.
